spec.description: Reports Mastodon version data and patch adoption

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  s."time",
  s."total_instances"
FROM (
  SELECT
    statistics.updated_at::timestamp AS "time",
    (
      statistics.main_instances
      + statistics.latest_instances
      + statistics.previous_instances
      + statistics.deprecated_instances
      + statistics.eol_instances
    ) AS "total_instances"
  FROM statistics
  ORDER BY statistics.date DESC
  LIMIT 30
) s
ORDER BY s."time" ASC;

spec.title: Patch Coverage
spec.description: Instances and monthly active user (MAU) count from instances deploying the latest patch versions

spec.rawSql:
WITH version_cases AS (
  SELECT latest AS software_version
  FROM release_versions
  WHERE status IN ('release', 'main')
),
eol_check AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT md.software_version
  FROM mastodon_domains md
  WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM release_versions rv
    WHERE rv.status = 'eol'
      AND md.software_version LIKE rv.branch || '.%'
  )
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT md.domain) AS total_domains,
    COALESCE(SUM(md.active_users_monthly), 0) AS total_users,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE md.software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM eol_check)
         OR md.software_version NOT IN (SELECT software_version FROM version_cases)
    ) AS unpatched_or_eol_domains,
    COALESCE(SUM(md.active_users_monthly) FILTER (
      WHERE md.software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM eol_check)
         OR md.software_version NOT IN (SELECT software_version FROM version_cases)
    ), 0) AS unpatched_or_eol_users
  FROM mastodon_domains md
)
SELECT
  ((total_domains - unpatched_or_eol_domains) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_domains, 0)) AS "Instances",
  ((total_users   - unpatched_or_eol_users)   * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_users, 0))   AS "MAU"
FROM agg;

spec.title: Supported Branches
spec.description: Instances and monthly active user (MAU) count from instances deploying a supported branch

spec.rawSql:
WITH supported_branches AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT branch
  FROM release_versions
  WHERE status IN ('release', 'main')
),
eol_branches AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT branch
  FROM release_versions
  WHERE status = 'eol'
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT md.domain) AS total_domains,
    COALESCE(SUM(md.active_users_monthly), 0) AS total_users,

    COUNT(DISTINCT md.domain) FILTER (
      WHERE EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM eol_branches eb
              WHERE md.software_version LIKE eb.branch || '.%'
            )
         OR NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM supported_branches sb
              WHERE md.software_version LIKE sb.branch || '.%'
            )
    ) AS unsupported_or_eol_domains,

    COALESCE(SUM(md.active_users_monthly) FILTER (
      WHERE EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM eol_branches eb
              WHERE md.software_version LIKE eb.branch || '.%'
            )
         OR NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM supported_branches sb
              WHERE md.software_version LIKE sb.branch || '.%'
            )
    ), 0) AS unsupported_or_eol_users
  FROM mastodon_domains md
)
SELECT
  ((total_domains - unsupported_or_eol_domains) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_domains, 0)) AS "Instances",
  ((total_users   - unsupported_or_eol_users)   * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_users, 0))   AS "MAU"
FROM agg;

spec.title: Patched Instances, Main
spec.description: Count of instances patched off the main development branch compared to the total instances on the main development branch.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) as "Main Patched"
FROM mastodon_domains 
WHERE software_version LIKE (
    SELECT latest
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level = -1
) || '%';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) as "Main Total"
FROM mastodon_domains 
WHERE software_version LIKE (
    SELECT branch || '.%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level = -1
);

spec.title: Patched Instances, Latest
spec.description: Count of instances patched off the latest release branch compared to the total instances on the latest release branch.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) AS "Latest Patched"
FROM mastodon_domains
WHERE software_version =
(
    SELECT latest
    FROM release_versions
    WHERE n_level = 0
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) as "Latest Total"
FROM mastodon_domains 
WHERE software_version LIKE (
    SELECT branch || '.%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level = 0
);

spec.title: Patched Instances, Previous
spec.description: Count of instances patched off the previous release branch compared to the total instances on the previous release branch.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) as "Latest Patched" 
FROM mastodon_domains md
WHERE md.software_version LIKE ANY (
    SELECT latest || '%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level = 1
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) as "Latest Total"
FROM mastodon_domains 
WHERE software_version LIKE (
    SELECT branch || '.%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level = 1
);

spec.title: Patched MAUs, Main
spec.description: Count of monthly active users (MAUs) on instances patched off the main development branch compared to the MAUs on the main development branch.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as updated_users
FROM mastodon_domains 
WHERE software_version LIKE ANY (
    SELECT latest || '%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level = -1
);

SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as "Main Total"
FROM mastodon_domains
WHERE software_version LIKE (
SELECT branch || '.%'
FROM release_versions
WHERE n_level = -1
);

spec.title: Patched MAUs, Latest
spec.description: Count of monthly active users (MAUs) on instances patched off the latest release branch compared to the MAUs on the latest release branch.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) AS updated_users
FROM mastodon_domains
WHERE software_version =
(
    SELECT latest
    FROM release_versions
    WHERE n_level = 0
);

SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as "Main Total"
FROM mastodon_domains
WHERE software_version LIKE (
SELECT branch || '.%'
FROM release_versions
WHERE n_level = 0
);

spec.title: Patched MAUs, Previous
spec.description: Count of monthly active users (MAUs) on instances patched off the previous release branch compared to the MAUs on the latest previous branch.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as updated_users
FROM mastodon_domains md
WHERE md.software_version LIKE ANY (
    SELECT latest || '%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level = 1
);

SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as "Main Total"
FROM mastodon_domains
WHERE software_version LIKE (
SELECT branch || '.%'
FROM release_versions
WHERE n_level = 1
);

spec.title: Mastodon Active Users (MAU)
spec.description: Based on the total count of reported monthly active users (MAU) of all visible Mastodon instances.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  s."time",
  s."value"
FROM (
  SELECT
    statistics.updated_at::timestamp AS "time",
    statistics.mau AS "value"
  FROM statistics
  ORDER BY statistics.date DESC
  LIMIT 30
) s
ORDER BY s."time" ASC;

WITH version_cases AS (
  SELECT latest AS software_version
  FROM release_versions
  WHERE status IN ('release', 'main')
),
eol_check AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT md.software_version
  FROM mastodon_domains md
  WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM release_versions rv
    WHERE rv.status = 'eol'
      AND md.software_version LIKE rv.branch || '.%'
  )
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM version_cases) THEN software_version
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM eol_check) THEN 'EOL'
    ELSE 'Unpatched'
  END as version,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM mastodon_domains 
GROUP BY CASE 
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM version_cases) THEN software_version
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM eol_check) THEN 'EOL'
    ELSE 'Unpatched'
  END;

WITH prefixes AS (
    SELECT branch 
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE status IN ('release', 'main')
),
matched AS (
    SELECT
        pv.branch AS prefix,
        COUNT(md.software_version) AS total
    FROM prefixes pv
    LEFT JOIN mastodon_domains md
      ON md.software_version LIKE pv.branch || '%'
    GROUP BY pv.branch
),
eol AS (
    SELECT
        'EOL' AS prefix,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM mastodon_domains md
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM release_versions rv
        WHERE rv.status = 'eol'
          AND md.software_version LIKE rv.branch || '%'
    )
)
SELECT * FROM matched
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM eol
ORDER BY prefix;

WITH prefixes AS (
    SELECT branch 
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE status IN ('release', 'main')
),
matched AS (
    SELECT
        pv.branch AS prefix,
        SUM(md.active_users_monthly) AS total_active_users
    FROM prefixes pv
    LEFT JOIN mastodon_domains md
      ON md.software_version LIKE pv.branch || '%'
    GROUP BY pv.branch
),
eol AS (
    SELECT
        'EOL' AS prefix,
        SUM(active_users_monthly) AS total_active_users
    FROM mastodon_domains md
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM release_versions rv
        WHERE rv.status = 'eol'
          AND md.software_version LIKE rv.branch || '%'
    )
)
SELECT * FROM matched
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM eol
ORDER BY prefix;

WITH version_cases AS (
  SELECT latest AS software_version
  FROM release_versions
  WHERE status IN ('release', 'main')
),
eol_check AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT md.software_version
  FROM mastodon_domains md
  WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM release_versions rv
    WHERE rv.status = 'eol'
      AND md.software_version LIKE rv.branch || '.%'
  )
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM version_cases) THEN software_version
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM eol_check) THEN 'EOL'
    ELSE 'Unpatched'
  END as version,
  SUM(active_users_monthly) as user_count
FROM mastodon_domains 
GROUP BY CASE 
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM version_cases) THEN software_version
    WHEN software_version IN (SELECT software_version FROM eol_check) THEN 'EOL'
    ELSE 'Unpatched'
  END;

WITH recent_releases AS (
    SELECT 
        branch,
        n_level
    FROM release_versions
    WHERE status IN ('release', 'eol')
    ORDER BY n_level
    LIMIT 7
),
total_count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) as total
    FROM mastodon_domains
    WHERE software_version IS NOT NULL
),
adoption_calc AS (
    SELECT
        rr.branch || '+' as version_label,
        rr.n_level,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM release_versions rv 
            WHERE rv.n_level <= rr.n_level 
            AND md.software_version LIKE rv.branch || '%'
        ) THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / tc.total AS adoption_percent
    FROM recent_releases rr
    CROSS JOIN mastodon_domains md
    CROSS JOIN total_count tc
    WHERE md.software_version IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY rr.branch, rr.n_level, tc.total
)
SELECT 
    version_label,
    adoption_percent
FROM adoption_calc
ORDER BY n_level;

WITH recent_releases AS (
    -- Get the 7 most recent releases ordered by n_level
    SELECT 
        branch,
        n_level
    FROM release_versions
    WHERE status IN ('release', 'eol')
    ORDER BY n_level
    LIMIT 7
),
total_mau AS (
    SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as total
    FROM mastodon_domains
    WHERE software_version IS NOT NULL
      AND active_users_monthly IS NOT NULL
),
adoption_calc AS (
    SELECT
        rr.branch || '+' as version_label,
        rr.n_level,
        SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM release_versions rv 
            WHERE rv.n_level <= rr.n_level 
            AND md.software_version LIKE rv.branch || '%'
        ) THEN md.active_users_monthly ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / tm.total AS adoption_percent
    FROM recent_releases rr
    CROSS JOIN mastodon_domains md
    CROSS JOIN total_mau tm
    WHERE md.software_version IS NOT NULL
      AND md.active_users_monthly IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY rr.branch, rr.n_level, tm.total
)
SELECT 
    version_label,
    adoption_percent
FROM adoption_calc
ORDER BY n_level;

spec.title: Patched Instances, Deprecated
spec.description: Count of instances patched off deprecated branches compared to the total instances on deprecated branches.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) as "Latest Patched" 
FROM mastodon_domains md
WHERE md.software_version LIKE ANY (
    SELECT latest || '%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level >= 2
    AND status != 'eol'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) as "Latest Total"
FROM mastodon_domains 
WHERE software_version LIKE ANY (
    SELECT branch || '.%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level >= 2
    AND status != 'eol'
);

spec.title: Patched MAUs, Deprecated
spec.description: Count of monthly active users (MAUs) on instances patched off the deprecated branches compared to the MAUs on the deprecated branches.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as updated_users
FROM mastodon_domains md
WHERE md.software_version LIKE ANY (
    SELECT latest || '%'
    FROM release_versions 
    WHERE n_level >= 2
    AND status != 'eol'
);

SELECT SUM(active_users_monthly) as "Main Total"
FROM mastodon_domains
WHERE software_version LIKE ANY (
SELECT branch || '.%'
FROM release_versions
WHERE n_level >= 1
AND status != 'eol'
);

spec.title: All Instances
spec.description: Instances which appear on the IFTAS DNI list are not reported on in detail, but may be included in the aggregated results above.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    md.domain AS "Instances",
    md.software_version AS "Version",
    md.full_version AS "Raw Version",
    rd.nodeinfo AS "Software",
    md.active_users_monthly AS "Monthly Active Users",
    md."timestamp" AS "Last Crawled"
FROM mastodon_domains md
LEFT JOIN raw_domains rd
    ON rd.domain = md.domain
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dni
    WHERE md.domain LIKE '%' || dni.domain
)
ORDER BY md.active_users_monthly DESC;

SELECT
  statistics.date AS time,
  statistics.main_patched_instances AS "Main Branch",
  statistics.latest_patched_instances AS "Latest Branch",
  statistics.previous_patched_instances AS "Previous Branch",
  statistics.deprecated_patched_instances AS "Deprecated Branch"
FROM
  statistics
ORDER BY
  statistics.date DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  statistics.date AS time,
  statistics.main_patched_mau AS "Main Branch",
  statistics.latest_patched_mau AS "Latest Branch",
  statistics.previous_patched_mau AS "Previous Branch",
  statistics.deprecated_patched_mau AS "Deprecated Branch"
FROM
  statistics
ORDER BY
  statistics.date DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  statistics.date AS time,
  statistics.main_instances AS "Main Branch",
  statistics.latest_instances AS "Latest Branch",
  statistics.previous_instances AS "Previous Branch",
  statistics.deprecated_instances AS "Deprecated Branch",
  statistics.eol_instances AS "EOL Branches"
FROM
  statistics
ORDER BY
  statistics.date DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  statistics.date AS time,
  statistics.main_branch_mau AS "Main Branch",
  statistics.latest_branch_mau AS "Latest Branch",
  statistics.previous_branch_mau AS "Previous Branch",
  statistics.deprecated_branch_mau AS "Deprecated Branch",
  statistics.eol_branch_mau AS "EOL Branches"
FROM
  statistics
ORDER BY
  statistics.date DESC
LIMIT 10;

spec.title: End of Life (EOL) Branch by Instances

spec.rawSql:
WITH prefixes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT branch AS prefix
  FROM release_versions 
  WHERE branch IS NOT NULL
    AND status = 'eol'
),
matched AS (
  SELECT
    p.prefix,
    COUNT(md.software_version) AS total
  FROM prefixes p
  LEFT JOIN mastodon_domains md
    ON md.software_version LIKE p.prefix || '%'
  GROUP BY p.prefix
)
SELECT prefix, total
FROM matched
ORDER BY prefix;

spec.title: End of Life (EOL) Branch by MAUs

spec.rawSql:
WITH prefixes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT branch AS prefix
  FROM release_versions 
  WHERE branch IS NOT NULL
    AND status = 'eol'
),
matched AS (
  SELECT
    p.prefix,
    COALESCE(SUM(md.active_users_monthly), 0) AS total_active_users
  FROM prefixes p
  LEFT JOIN mastodon_domains md
    ON md.software_version LIKE p.prefix || '%'
  GROUP BY p.prefix
)
SELECT prefix, total_active_users
FROM matched
ORDER BY prefix;

spec.title: vmcrawl
